text: The race-outcome mispricing (pwin minus implied) has no power to predict scalp maturation (AUC 0.502, flat across deciles) — the pwin-as-direction idea is refuted.
Maturation by mispricing decile is flat ~12–14% (under-priced 11.7%, over-priced 13.1%, base 12.3%) — zero monotonic relationship.

locator.quote: race-outcome pwin adds nothing on top

text: dir_q50_3m (0.599) is the best single maturation signal but is already in the obs and used by the 0.745 mature head; the race-outcome pwin adds nothing on top.
